response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of solid software engineering, staff-level seniority, and notably is already working on MCP server development and agentic workflow infrastructure in his current role — directly relevant to the key technologies listed. However, the resume has critical gaps against the core requirements: Python is entirely absent from his skillset, he lists no RAG architecture or vector database experience, and his GenAI work is limited to his current position started April 2025, nowhere near the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development required. He could be worth a screening call to assess whether his current AI work is deeper than the resume conveys, but as written the application falls significantly short.
strengths: Current role explicitly includes MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, directly matching key role technologies
Strong production TypeScript and AWS CDK background with demonstrated staff-level technical leadership and mentoring
Track record in high-throughput, data-intensive systems (millions of HTTP req/s at Dunnhumby) with low-latency and async architecture experience
concerns: Python is entirely absent from skills and employment history — a primary language for the role with no evidence of proficiency
No explicit mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or observability frameworks for AI systems
GenAI experience is limited to the current role begun April 2025, falling far short of the 8+ year AI-solution development requirement

key_factors.factor: MCP server and agentic workflow work in current role
